topic: Google Business Profile: why responding to every review boosts local ranking

script.hook: Not responding to reviews is hurting your Google ranking.
beats: Google watches how active you are on your Business Profile. When you respond to every review, it signals that your business is real and engaged.
It does not matter if the review is five stars or one star. Responding shows Google and customers that a real person is running this business.
This week, log in and reply to your last ten reviews. Keep it short, keep it genuine. That alone can bump your local search position.
